'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=Se8O1CGM.QjDuSZlVHrlJczVzz3ixdAvbKU.21owo8Y-1774782166-1.0.1.1-59s0TL8Z3tYrG2QMnF9n3S1J26xXE3I0Urao8HMwXSI"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
